rationale: Fresh documentation validation consumed the documentation build, source feedback build, feedback validation report, and changed UI knowledge docs from repository refs. The documentation build traces accepted REQ-UI-ASCII-001..012 into the CodeWiki UI, Board, Map, Status Panel, and system UI docs. Product and system UI docs agree on header navigation (`Status`, `KB`, `Board`, `Map`, `Sessions`), no persistent sidebars/status line, KB Product/System drilldown, Product Stories/UI Surfaces, System ASCII-like diagrams/cards, Board Kanban behavior, Map/Sessions terminology, repo-backed Settings, local URL header detail, and secondary-screen/non-terminal boundary. Remaining open questions are explicitly planning/implementation scope and do not block documentation handoff.
checks: read changed knowledge docs listed by handoff
manual vertical alignment review feedback_build -> knowledge docs -> documentation_build
manual horizontal coherence review across Control Room, Board, Map, Status Panel, and system UI docs
grep changed docs for legacy UI terms and layout constraints
git rev-parse HEAD and git status --short

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

isolation.notes: Fresh validator context from handoff refs only. Worktree has pre-existing dirty state; documentation profile requires fresh context, not clean-worktree or checked-SHA evidence.
